name: memoir-agent-skills
description: Claude Agent Skills for memoir writing workflow

skills.name: memoir-orchestrator
skills.description: Project lead: tracks state, picks the next action, routes skills, runs proactive nudges

skills.name: memoir-coach
skills.description: Pacing and motivation: shrinks tasks, works through resistance, sustains cadence

skills.name: memoir-memory-recall
skills.description: Elicit personal memories through structured recall questions

skills.name: memoir-architect-biographer
skills.description: Guide memoir structure, outlines, and content validation

skills.name: memoir-writing
skills.description: Generate restrained memoir-style prose from memories

skills.name: memoir-revision
skills.description: Edit drafted chapters and run accuracy, fairness, and safety checks

shared_references.name: memoir-purpose-and-audience
shared_references.description: Phase 0: set reader, scope, and theme (the Project Compass)

shared_references.name: memoir-ethics-and-care
shared_references.description: Cross-cutting: emotional safety, writing about real people, the truth contract

workflow.description: Pipeline: Purpose & Audience (Phase 0) → Memory Recall → Architecture → Writing → Revision. The Orchestrator drives the pipeline and the Coach sustains momentum; both read/write project_state.md.
